I think this is partly because I've had to work hard to get where I am, and I've learned the importance of being proactive and responsible. I also value stability and predictability, which is why I think the clue 'Deadline' belongs more towards the 'Early completion' side of the spectrum. I've always tried to give myself plenty of time to complete tasks, and I've been successful in meeting deadlines, so I think this reflects my personality and approach to work.
